name: Variety Spice Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the baking mix, sugar, cinnamon, cloves, and nutmeg in a medium bowl; mix well.
2. Beat together the applesauce, evaporated milk, oil, and egg.
3. Add the liquid mixture to the dry mixture. Stir just until the dry ingredients are moistened.
4. Fill 12 buttered muffin cups about 2/3 full with batter.
5. Bake in a hot oven (400°F) for 15-20 minutes.
6. Cool slightly; remove from the pan.
7. Makes 12 muffins.
TOPPING:
Mix 1/4 cup sugar and 1/4 teaspoon cinnamon. Dip the tops of the muffins in 2 tablespoons melted butter, then roll the tops in the cinnamon-sugar mixture.
